tasks.subject: Task 1: Amend cleanup spec for scanner-grade pattern set
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bring the spec at `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-secret-scanning-cleanup-design.md` in line with the scanner-grade pattern decision and make the spec itself pass the audit it specifies.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-secret-scanning-cleanup-design.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- §3.4.2 declares scanner-grade `_PATTERNS` list (sk_token, aws_access_key, pem_private_key, hf_token@32+), not production `_CREDENTIAL_PATTERNS`.
- §3.4.4 asserts `>= 4` patterns with canonical names.
- §1.0 file table includes cleanup spec as 4th in-scope file.
- §3.1/§3.2/§3.3 examples free of literal credential prefixes (Before is concat-escaped, After is shape).
- §7 AC list rewritten for scanner-grade + 4-file scope + self-audit.
- New `## Spec amendment 2026-06-01` section recorded near top.
- Scanner-grade dry-run returns zero hits.

**Verify:** scanner-grade dry-run script (full body in plan); expect `OK`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-secret-scanning-cleanup-design.md"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c 'import re; from pathlib import Path; patterns=[(\"sk_token\", re.compile(r\"\\bsk-[A-Za-z0-9_\\-]{20,}\\b\")), (\"aws_access_key\", re.compile(r\"\\b(?:AKIA|ASIA)[0-9A-Z]{16}\\b\")), (\"pem_private_key\", re.compile(r\"-----BEGIN [A-Z ]{0,40}PRIVATE KEY-----[\\s\\S]*?-----END [A-Z ]{0,40}PRIVATE KEY-----\")), (\"hf_token\", re.compile(r\"\\bhf_[A-Za-z0-9]{32,}\\b\"))]; txt=Path(\"docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-secret-scanning-cleanup-design.md\").read_text(); hits=sum(len(pat.findall(txt)) for _,pat in patterns); assert hits==0; print(\"OK\")'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["§3.4.2 declares scanner-grade _PATTERNS list, not production _CREDENTIAL_PATTERNS", "§3.4.4 asserts >= 4 patterns with canonical names", "§1.0 file table includes cleanup spec as 4th in-scope file", "§3.1/§3.2/§3.3 examples free of literal credential prefixes (Before is concat-escaped, After is shape)", "§7 AC list rewritten for scanner-grade + 4-file scope + self-audit", "Spec amendment section recorded near top", "Scanner-grade dry-run returns zero hits"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Forward-fix the 3 Layer P bug-fix #1 files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove every literal credential-prefix string from the 3 source files that fired GitHub Secret Scanning, preserving runtime values.

**Files:**
- Modify: `tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py:310-316` (concat the 5 sk_token/AKIA/ASIA/PEM tuples; leave the 4 rpa/hf/fal/bearer tuples at 306-309 untouched)
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-layer-p-task7-bugfix1-recording-seam-redaction-design.md:246-257` (shape-replace 5 examples + line 257 sk-proj callout)
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-01-layer-p-task7-bugfix1-recording-seam-redaction.md:247-250, 277-283` (AC checklist + test-fixture transcription shape-replace; line 1224 untouched)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Test fixture concat preserves byte-identical runtime tuples; pytest credential-pattern tests pass unchanged.
- Layer P spec uses shape grammar in example block + line 257 callout; fence flips python → text.
- Layer P plan uses shape grammar in AC checklist + test-fixture transcription; line 1224 left untouched.
- Scanner-grade dry-run across 4 in-scope files returns zero hits.
- Existing pytest credential-pattern tests pass unchanged.

**Verify:** dry-run script across 4 files + `pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'credential_pattern or sk_guard or pattern_recursion'`; expect `OK` and PASS for all parametrised cases.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py", "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-layer-p-task7-bugfix1-recording-seam-redaction-design.md", "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-01-layer-p-task7-bugfix1-recording-seam-redaction.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/test_runpod_conftest.py -v -k 'credential_pattern or sk_guard or pattern_recursion'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Test fixture concat preserves runtime byte-identity", "Layer P spec uses shape grammar in example block + line 257 callout", "Layer P plan uses shape grammar in AC checklist + test-fixture transcription", "Scanner-grade dry-run across 4 in-scope files returns zero hits", "Existing pytest credential-pattern tests pass unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add tests/test_source_audit.py lockdown
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a permanent fail-closed test that walks documentation + tests + repo-root markdown + `.env.example` and raises on any future credential-prefix literal, using the scanner-grade pattern set.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/test_source_audit.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- File defines its own scanner-grade `_PATTERNS` (sk_token, aws_access_key, pem_private_key, hf_token@32+); does NOT import from `tests/providers/conftest_runpod.py`.
- Walked paths: `docs/superpowers/**/*.md` + `tests/**/*.py` + repo-root `README.md/AGENTS.md/PROGRESS.md/CLAUDE.md/.env.example` (existing only).
- `SourceLeakHit` dataclass with path/line/column/pattern_name/match_snippet.
- Three pytest functions: main walk, self-test (`len(_PATTERNS) >= 4`), reverse-test (`tmp_path` plant via concat-escaped literal).
- `pixi run pytest tests/test_source_audit.py -v` → 3 PASS.
- Full `pixi run pytest` suite passes (test count +3).
- Pre-commit clean (ruff + ruff-format + mypy green, no `# type: ignore` / `# noqa`).

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/test_source_audit.py -v && pixi run pytest`; expect `3 passed` for the audit file + full suite green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_source_audit.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_source_audit.py -v && pixi run pytest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_PATTERNS defined locally with 4 scanner-grade entries", "Walked paths include docs/superpowers/**/*.md + tests/**/*.py + 5 repo-root files", "SourceLeakHit dataclass present", "Three test functions: main walk, self-test, reverse-test", "pixi run pytest tests/test_source_audit.py -v → 3 PASS", "Full pytest suite passes (+3 new tests)", "Pre-commit clean (ruff + mypy green, no type-ignore / noqa)"]}
```
